questions.name: C - Functions: Anagram
questions.questiontext:
Given two strings s1 and s2, return true if s1 is an anagram of s2, and false otherwise. An anagram is a word formed by rearranging the letters of another
Example:

questions.name: C - Functions: Armstrong number
questions.questiontext:
Given integer n write a function that returns true if n is an Armstrong number, and false otherwise. A natural number is an Armstrong number if it is equal to the sum of its own digits each raised to the power of the number of digits.
Example:
questions.code:
int n = 153;
isArmstrong(n) // Result: true, because 153 = 1^3 + 5^3 + 3^3
